queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of how critical credit history accounts or existing credit portfolios serve as mitigating determinants in consumer default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Determinants of default: empirical analysis of the impact of negative checking account balances on credit risk drivers.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Credit risk drivers: empirical analysis of how the absence of a checking account increases consumer default probability.
